rooms.label: 1a
rooms.name: Bazaar Side Entrance
rooms.gm_note: Junction into the goblin bazaar; banging construction noise carries from 1b.

rooms.label: 1b
rooms.name: Auction Hall

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.note: building an auction stage; retreat to 1d if attacked

rooms.gm_note: Stage under construction for slave/goods auctions.

rooms.label: 1c
rooms.name: Gibbets and Gravy
rooms.gm_note: Glom knows this level's layout, the Xanathar outposts, and the stairs to Level 3.

rooms.label: 1d
rooms.name: Market Hall

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.note: guards, knock troublemakers out rather than kill

rooms.gm_note: Goblin market: buys at half price, sells at 3x; DC 12 Cha to haggle.

rooms.label: 1e
rooms.name: Yek the Tall

monsters.name: Goblin Boss
monsters.note: Yek the Tall, wears circlet of human perfection

rooms.gm_note: Copper Stormforge (Fine Fellows) chained here; can be ransomed or freed.

rooms.label: 1f
rooms.name: Yek's Treasure
rooms.gm_note: Diorama (15 costume jewelry, 1gp ea), ivory chessboard (25gp), chest of 2,000 sp.

rooms.label: 2a
rooms.name: Water Pump
rooms.gm_note: Dead goblin messenger; smell of cooking lures toward 2c.

rooms.label: 2b
rooms.name: Abandoned Laboratory
rooms.gm_note: Noisy search finds 3 potions of healing and a philter of love; alerts the specter in 2c.

rooms.label: 2c
rooms.name: Wizard's Kitchen

monsters.name: Specter
monsters.note: hides in the cook pot, animates 4 pots/pans as flying swords

rooms.gm_note: Illusion of a clean kitchen; DC 16 Investigation sees through it.

rooms.label: 2d
rooms.name: Kalabash's Bedroom
rooms.gm_note: Trapped chest (DC 15 Dex or 10 lightning); locked, cursed lore inside a cipher-written tome.

rooms.name: Halaster Puppet

monsters.name: Animated Armor
monsters.note: Halaster puppet construct, AC10 HP8, hidden alchemist's fire

rooms.gm_note: Threatens intruders in Halaster's voice; optional 'Delver Dance' game show encounter.

rooms.name: Abandoned Camp
rooms.gm_note: Xanathar Guild's abandoned camp; corpses carry the outpost pass-phrase, 'As many as there are stars in the sky.'

rooms.name: Arch Gate to Level 4
rooms.gm_note: Feed a gold coin to open 1 minute; 8th level+ only.

teleport.label: Arch Gate to Level 4 (8th level+, feed a gold coin)

rooms.name: Music of the Dead
rooms.gm_note: Bone harpsichord; playing its tune (DC 20 Performance if unskilled) reveals a scroll of raise dead, or 4d10 necrotic on failure.

rooms.label: 7a
rooms.name: Trenzia's Workroom
rooms.gm_note: Trenzia's electricity-research notes; log entry (Day 1).

rooms.label: 7b
rooms.name: Ghoul Barrels

monsters.name: Ghoul
monsters.note: hidden inside barrels, burst out if disturbed

rooms.gm_note: Copper-plated door to 7c shocks (3d6 lightning) unless 7c's creatures are dead.

rooms.label: 7c
rooms.name: Trenzia's Laboratory

monsters.name: Flameskull
monsters.note: Trenzia; lightning bolt + Lightning Ray instead of fire

monsters.name: Flesh Golem
monsters.note: heals on electrified floor instead of taking damage

rooms.gm_note: Copper floor electrifies each round for 3d6 lightning; chute down to 13a.

rooms.label: 7d
rooms.name: Mining Woes
rooms.gm_note: Trenzia's gnawed remains; her skull is notably missing.

rooms.label: 7e
rooms.name: Copper Vein
rooms.gm_note: Trenzia's log (Day 10); 1d4+1 potions of healing + 2 potions of lightning resistance in 7c's wreckage.

rooms.name: Fresco Cross Hall
rooms.gm_note: Animated (harmless) dwarf frescoes at a four-way intersection.

rooms.label: 9a
rooms.name: Trapped Hall

monsters.name: Bugbear
monsters.note: guard the east narrows; disarm traps for known Xanathar members

rooms.gm_note: 5 poison dart traps in the north wall; pass-phrase 'As many as there are stars in the sky.'

rooms.label: 9a
rooms.name: Trapped Hall (west)
rooms.gm_note: Western stretch of the same trapped hallway.

rooms.label: 9b
rooms.name: Shunn's Gang

monsters.name: Intellect Devourer
monsters.note: riding in two guild members' skulls

rooms.gm_note: Shunn offers 50gp for the wererats' stone key if approached peacefully.

rooms.label: 9c
rooms.name: Gang's Treasure
rooms.gm_note: Silver-bound chest (Shunn's key or DC 15 thieves' tools) holds 100gp.

rooms.label: 9d
rooms.name: Bugbear Barracks
rooms.gm_note: Sleeping barracks.

rooms.label: 10a
rooms.name: Skull in the Cube

monsters.name: Gelatinous Cube
monsters.note: enlarged to Gargantuan by the dwarf skull inside

rooms.gm_note: Removing the skull shrinks the cube back to normal size.

rooms.label: 10b
rooms.name: Flooded Room
rooms.gm_note: 24,000 cu ft salt water floods out when opened (DC 12 Str or prone+1d10); Salamanth's corpse; glass wand worth 25gp.

rooms.label: 10c
rooms.name: Altar to Juiblex

monsters.name: Ochre Jelly
monsters.note: disguised as a gold offering in magical stasis

rooms.gm_note: Stasis breaks on touch or dispel magic (DC 17).

rooms.label: 10d
rooms.name: Caved-In Room
rooms.gm_note: Partial cave-in with bored tunnels south and east.

rooms.label: 11a
rooms.name: Hall of Degeneration
rooms.gm_note: Wall paintings depict wizards mutating into nothics and a gibbering mouther.

rooms.label: 11b
rooms.name: Master of the Unseen

monsters.name: Priest
monsters.note: Midna Tauberth, NE, worships Shar; prefers to wait out or ingratiate

rooms.gm_note: Banquet table magically replenished daily; holy symbols of Shar and Waukeen worth 25gp each.

rooms.name: Dwarven Tools
rooms.gm_note: Dwarven tool storage.

teleport.label: Arch Gate to Level 5 (8th level+, touch a dead twig/branch)

rooms.label: 13a
rooms.name: Dumathoin's Altar
rooms.gm_note: Cleaning the altar grants 24h secret-door detection; 4 mithral ore chunks (25gp ea) under a mine cart.

rooms.label: 13b
rooms.name: Wall of Rust and Bones
rooms.gm_note: 8-ft skeleton/armor wall (DC 12 Athletics to climb); breaking it summons the nothics from 13e.

rooms.label: 13c
rooms.name: Vacant Washroom
rooms.gm_note: Rusted, inoperable dwarven washroom.

rooms.label: 13d
rooms.name: Vacant Washroom
rooms.gm_note: Rusted, inoperable dwarven washroom.

rooms.label: 13e
rooms.name: "Nothic to See Here!"

monsters.name: Nothic
monsters.note: insane, cowed by displays of magic

rooms.gm_note: Arcane-locked door (Rizzeryl passes freely, else DC 25 Str); dwarven boots/helmets/goggles stored here.

rooms.label: 13f
rooms.name: Gibbering Mine
rooms.gm_note: Partially collapsed copper-vein mine section.

rooms.label: 13g
rooms.name: Strike It Rich

monsters.name: Mezzoloth
monsters.note: bound here by Halaster; commands the nothics by telepathy

rooms.gm_note: Rex the Hammer (Fine Fellows founder, ally if rescued) is pinned here; mine carts hold 1,000+ gp of copper ore.

rooms.label: 14a
rooms.name: Rizzeryl's Hideout

monsters.name: Drow Mage
monsters.note: Rizzeryl; casts greater invisibility on sight, summons a quasit if attacked

rooms.gm_note: Arcane-locked door; stone-map table; secret compartment (DC 15 Perception) holds his spellbook, a stone key, and a wand.

rooms.label: 14b
rooms.name: Wererat Barracks

monsters.name: Wererat
monsters.note: human form; loyal to the Zhentarim, led by Zilitsa Ilvarren

rooms.gm_note: Chest: 30gp, copper tankard, silver scepter (25gp), worthless chap-books.

rooms.name: Dusty Throne
rooms.gm_note: Already looted by the wererats; nothing of value remains.

rooms.name: Partially Collapsed Room
rooms.gm_note: Collapsed, empty, undisturbed.

rooms.name: Hungry Rust Monsters

monsters.name: Rust Monster
monsters.note: fighting over a rusted helm; torch brackets can distract them 1d6 min

rooms.gm_note: Old festival hall, 30ft ceiling.

rooms.name: Cold Storage
rooms.gm_note: 0°F room; any spell cast here triggers 8d8 cold damage to all present (1/hour).

rooms.label: 19a
rooms.name: Arachnid Down
rooms.gm_note: Dead giant spider under a fallen chandelier.

rooms.label: 19b
rooms.name: Old Bedchamber
rooms.gm_note: Dead giant spider; armoire holds a halfling skeleton with a ring of swimming.

rooms.label: 19c
rooms.name: Sticky Webs
rooms.gm_note: Disturbing the webs alerts the spiders in 19d.

rooms.label: 19d
rooms.name: Spider Warren
rooms.gm_note: Spider lair.

rooms.label: 19e
rooms.name: Spider Larder
rooms.gm_note: 5 cocoons hold desiccated goblin/nothic corpses (20cp, 18sp, 5gp, silvered dagger).

rooms.label: 22a
rooms.name: Ale Dispenser

monsters.name: Skeleton
monsters.note: dwarf skeletons, brew ale endlessly; passive unless attacked or robbed

rooms.gm_note: 6th spigot releases green slime (1d10 acid/round until scraped/destroyed).

rooms.label: 22b
rooms.name: "Brewers Only!"
rooms.gm_note: Halaster's voice trap triggers on entry.

rooms.label: 22c
rooms.name: Ale Vats

monsters.name: Beholder Zombie
monsters.note: rises from the southwest vat if disturbed

rooms.gm_note: 30 empty zurkhwood barrels can be used to cross 22d's pit traps safely.

rooms.label: 22d
rooms.name: Barrel Run
rooms.gm_note: 3 hidden 20-ft pits (DC 15 Perception, 2d6 bludgeoning); rolling in a barrel avoids them.

rooms.label: 22e
rooms.name: North Ale Storage
rooms.gm_note: 140 barrels of preserved dwarven ale, 40gp each in Waterdeep.

rooms.label: 22f
rooms.name: South Ale Storage

monsters.name: Mimic
monsters.note: disguised as 3 of the 59 intact barrels

rooms.gm_note: Collapsed barrel pyramid; mimics hide within 10ft of each other.

rooms.label: 20a
rooms.name: Beholder Zombie

monsters.name: Beholder Zombie
monsters.note: attacks anyone not showing Xanathar's symbol

rooms.gm_note: Combat here draws reinforcements from 20b.

rooms.label: 20b
rooms.name: Watch Post Barracks
rooms.gm_note: Secret door west to 20c; Nadia eagerly leads any fight.

rooms.label: 20c
rooms.name: Arch Gate to Level 6
rooms.gm_note: Secret doors to 20b/20d nearby.

teleport.label: Arch Gate to Level 6 (9th level+, touch ferrous metal)

rooms.label: 20d
rooms.name: Secret Armory
rooms.gm_note: Mostly ruined dwarven arms and armor.

rooms.name: Animated Ballistae

monsters.name: Animated Object
monsters.note: animated ballistae, AC15 HP50, 3d10 fire bolt, blindsight 120ft

rooms.gm_note: Ignore creatures in the easternmost 60ft of the hall.

rooms.label: 23a
rooms.name: Defaced Dwarves
rooms.gm_note: Harmless writhing stone tentacles replace the original dwarf carvings.

rooms.label: 25a
rooms.name: Caryatids of Restoration

monsters.name: Modron
monsters.note: Halastron, a rogue quadrone; friendly, defends the caryatids

rooms.gm_note: Command phrase 'Elf magic!' cures blind/deaf/petrified/poisoned/stunned in the area, 4 charges/dawn.

rooms.label: 25b
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25c
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25d
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25e
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25f
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25g
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25h
rooms.name: Halaster's Statue

monsters.name: Halaster Blackcloak
monsters.note: petrified; hidden behind a secret door

rooms.gm_note: Restoring it triggers a magic mouth: "Fools!"

rooms.label: 25i
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25j
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25k
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25l
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25m
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: An illusory (intangible) wall behind it conceals a tunnel.

rooms.label: 25n
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25o
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25p
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25q
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues
rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 25r
rooms.name: Lifelike Statues

monsters.name: Human Wererat
monsters.note: petrified; Zarn Kassifax, tries to join Rizzeryl's gang if freed

rooms.gm_note: Restorable with greater restoration or the caryatids.

rooms.label: 23b
rooms.name: Hall of Dead Dragons
rooms.gm_note: 5 harmless posed dragon skeletons (brass, bronze, copper, gold, silver).

rooms.name: Dead Adventurer
rooms.gm_note: Tiefling monk skeleton (Savir, killed by a cloaker); speak with dead reveals a nearby elven tomb's secret door.

rooms.label: 26a
rooms.name: Do Not Feed the Owlbears!
rooms.gm_note: Secret door north to 26b; a pot of awakening is close to hatching an awakened shrub.

rooms.label: 26b
rooms.name: Secret Tomb
rooms.gm_note: False sarcophagus (DC 17 Perception) - a solid alabaster block, not openable.

rooms.label: 26c
rooms.name: Halaster's Crushing Eye
rooms.gm_note: Rolling-sphere trap (10d10 bludgeoning, DC 15 Dex) down the sloped hall to 26d.

rooms.label: 26d
rooms.name: Bloodletting Chamber
rooms.gm_note: 6 shackled ritual bloodletting tables.

rooms.label: 26e
rooms.name: Abandoned Study
rooms.gm_note: Dust of disappearance in an urn; a burned spellbook among mundane tomes.
